hooks.command: bash -lc 'for root in "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/cc-notify-hooks/latest "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/cc-notify-hooks/* "$HOME"/.codex/cc-notify-hooks; do [ -f "$root/scripts/notify.sh" ] && exec bash "$root/scripts/notify.sh" notification; done; exit 0'

bash -lc 'for root in "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/cc-notify-hooks/latest "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/cc-notify-hooks/* "$HOME"/.codex/cc-notify-hooks; do [ -f "$root/scripts/notify.sh" ] && exec bash "$root/scripts/notify.sh" stop; done; exit 0'

bash -lc 'for root in "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/cc-notify-hooks/latest "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/cc-notify-hooks/* "$HOME"/.codex/cc-notify-hooks; do [ -f "$root/scripts/clear_pending.sh" ] && exec bash "$root/scripts/clear_pending.sh"; done; exit 0'

bash -lc 'for root in "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/cc-notify-hooks/latest "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/cc-notify-hooks/* "$HOME"/.codex/cc-notify-hooks; do [ -f "$root/scripts/clear_pending.sh" ] && exec bash "$root/scripts/clear_pending.sh"; done; exit 0'
